name: Potato and Tomato Salad

ingredients.item: medium potatoes, boiled, peeled and sliced
small Spanish onion, very thinly sliced
ripe tomatoes, diced, or 16 cherry tomatoes
capers in brine, drained and chopped

method: Serves 4 4 medium potatoes, boiled, peeled and sliced 1 small Spanish onion, very thinly sliced 8 ripe tomatoes, diced, or 16 cherry tomatoes 12 black or green olives, pitted 30 g capers in brine, drained and chopped 1 handful fresh basil leaves, chopped 1 handful fresh oregano leaves, chopped 80 ml good-quality virgin olive oil salt and ground black pepper
Add the basil, oregano and oil, and toss together gently but thoroughly. Season and serve with plenty of crusty Italian bread.
